name: Intel Core i7 12700 12th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i7 12700 12th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i7 12700 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i7 12700 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.87,000. This CPU features 12 cores (8 Performance + 4 Efficient) and 20 threads with boost clock speeds up to 4.9 GHz, offering excellent performance for gaming, multitasking, and productivity workloads. Built for the LGA 1700 platform, it supports both DDR4 and DDR5 memory along with PCIe 5.0 for fast graphics and storage support
